brainAccessPage.title: Tunnels
brainAccessPage.lead: A Braintunnel is a private line to someone else’s assistant. Here you choose how much yours shares with each person when they reach you—and when you write back.

errors.invalidGrantsResponse: Couldn’t load this page. Try again.
errors.couldNotAddHandle: Couldn’t add @{{handle}}. Check the handle and try again.

policyDetailPage.builtinReadOnlyNote: This text is part of a standard preset and can’t be edited. Add a custom policy when you need different instructions, then assign it to each collaborator.
policyDetailPage.editGuidance: Your assistant follows this text for everyone under this policy.

tooltips.removeCollaboratorsFirst: Remove collaborators before you can delete this policy.

errors.invalidGrantsResponse: Couldn’t load this page. Try again.
errors.couldNotAddHandle: Couldn’t add @{{handle}}. Check the handle and try again.
errors.cannotSaveWithoutCollaborators: Add at least one collaborator before saving.

deletePolicyDialog.title: Delete this policy?
deletePolicyDialog.body: This removes “{{label}}” from your saved policies.

outboundGrantsList.heading: Brains you can message
outboundGrantsList.description: People who accepted your connection to their assistant. Message them from Tunnels when you chat.
outboundGrantsList.empty: No one here yet. After someone accepts your connection, they’ll show up.

changePolicyDialog.title: Change policy
changePolicyDialog.description: Which preset should apply to this person?

trusted.label: Trusted confidante
trusted.hint: Stops passwords, sensitive money or health details, privileged legal material, and private confidences about others that are not part of their coordination need—plus raw technical leftovers. Project nicknames and light routing can still pass when they are not sensitive. This is not a 'shorter reply' control.

general.label: General collaborator
general.hint: Everything in Trusted, and it also trims courtesy hellos routed through unrelated people, speculative or rumor-framed colleague detail when it is optional, and internal nicknames when time, place, and decisions read clearly without the label.

minimal-disclosure.label: Minimal disclosure
minimal-disclosure.hint: Strongest preset: treats internal nicknames as sensitive unless dropping them would make the reply misleading about what happens or when; removes optional narrative, hedging, and assistant-style offers unless they clearly invited more—prefers the smallest honest surface.

serverDefault.label: Standard baseline
serverDefault.hint: Shared minimum when no named preset applies: no credentials, sensitive health or legal material, unrelated third-party gossip, or risky financial detail—paraphrase when quoting would leak.

brainQueryPolicyBaselineNote.ariaLabel: Categories always excluded from collaborator replies
brainQueryPolicyBaselineNote.description: Braintunnel always keeps these topics out of collaborator replies, in addition to the policy you pick. You don’t need to repeat them in your own wording.

empty.typeToSearch: Type a @handle or name to search.
empty.noMatches: No matches—try another spelling or email.
